mapper.sql: id, dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, sort_order, status, css_class, list_class, is_default, remark, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_data SET dict_type = #{dictType}, dict_label = #{dictLabel}, dict_value = #{dictValue}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, css_class = #{cssClass}, list_class = #{listClass}, is_default = #{isDefault}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = FALSE AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
